vision.title: Vision
vision.label: Our Purpose
vision.text: To develop and deliver industry-relevant education to train students to be technically sound, research-driven innovators who can effectively meet the skills required by the industry both at national and global level.

mission.title: Mission
mission.label: Our Goal
points: Improve academic practices that bridge theory and research.
Create a research-led teaching environment combining classroom learning-by-doing.
Impart collaborative resources to build a diverse intellectual space.
Nurture researchers and critical thinkers through emerging technologies.
Seek student solutions and critical thinking in a powerful environment.

programmes.subtitle: Academic Programmes
programmes.description: Over the years, Career Point University has earned several accolades for playing a dynamic role in elevating research and the learning process of the institution.

mca.title: Master of Computer Application (MCA)
mca.description: Detailed description about MCA goes here...

hero.description: Comprehensive foundation in computer science with hands-on training in programming, AI, data science, cybersecurity & emerging technologies.

overview.subtitle: What is the MCA Programme?
paragraphs: MCA Programme is a three-year, six-semester program that offers holistic knowledge of fundamentals in computational applications technology enabling efficient solutions for industries and business problems — fostering creativity and resolution-thinking by addressing AI-enhanced tools with IoT industry for providing real-time solutions efficiently.

Overall, MCA programme enables students with a comprehensive understanding of computer science principles, practical skills in computer programming, and opportunities for career growth in the dynamic and evolving field of information technology.

sectionTitle.main: Scope of Master of Computer Application (MCA)

scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in the world of technology
scope.body: The MCA program is a comprehensive three-year undertaking that produces students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, spanning programming languages such as C, C++, Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. Additionally, students learn to leverage data, machine learning, AI research, writing skills, and skill development. Graduates can pursue roles as software developers, database administrators, system analysts, IT consultants, and cybersecurity professionals.

curriculum.subtitle: A well-structured curriculum designed for excellence
curriculum.introNote: The MCA programme is a comprehensive curriculum providing students with a solid foundation in computer science, spanning programming languages (C, C++, Java), data structures, database management, software engineering, web development, and computer networks.
curriculum.outroNote: Graduates of MCA are well prepared for diverse career specialization in the IT industry, including roles such as software developers, system analysts, IT consultants, database administrators, and cybersecurity professionals.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure
accordionSections.content:
The Master of Computer Applications (MCA) program at Career Point University is a comprehensive three-year undergraduate course designed to provide students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, including programming languages such as C, C++, and Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. In addition to these core topics, the program offers specialized modules in emerging fields like data science, machine learning, statistical analysis, and big data technologies, ensuring that students are well-versed in current industry trends.

The following table outlines the comprehensive course structure of the MCA program. It is organized into core, elective, interdisciplinary, and skill enhancement components. Each category specifies the type of courses, their descriptions, and the corresponding credits, ensuring a well-rounded academic experience with a balance of foundational knowledge, research exposure, and professional ethics:

accordionSections.title: Semester-1
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 1 include: Programming Fundamentals (C Language), Mathematics I, Digital Electronics, Introduction to IT, and Communication Skills. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-2
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 2 include: Data Structures, Mathematics II, Object Oriented Programming (C++), Web Technology Basics, and Environmental Studies. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-3
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 3 include: Database Management Systems, Java Programming, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Elective I. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-4
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 4 include: Advanced Java, Software Engineering, Computer Architecture, Elective II, and Minor Project. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-5
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 5 include: Machine Learning, Data Science, Mobile Application Development, Elective III, and Internship. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-6
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 6 include: Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, Major Project, and Professional Ethics. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: University Core
accordionSections.content: University Core courses include: Environmental Science, Human Values & Professional Ethics, Indian Constitution & Traditional Knowledge, and Sports/NSS/NCC activities.

accordionSections.title: Departmental Elective
accordionSections.content: Departmental Elective options include: Advanced Database Systems, Internet of Things (IoT), Blockchain Technology, AR/VR Development, Big Data Analytics, and Natural Language Processing.

admissionFee.subtitle: Simple admission process and transparent fee structure

admissionCriteria.text: Through Majority & Scholarship Test (DPM-SAT). For details,
Admission procedure: For follow-up admissions process. To apply,

notes.text: Merit scholarship is offered to students based on previous class.
Tuition and fees may be net once your scholarship criteria is evaluated (A+ or equivalent year).
A 50% scholarship is given to students in the merit scholarship.
If a valid scholarship / subject scholarship fees are 50% off and student fails to continue, they may be eligible for cancellation scholarship.
To avail merit scholarship, student has to submit supporting documents in original along with 1 set of photocopies.

sectionTitle.main: Why Join Master of Computer Application (MCA)?

whyJoin.subtitle: Unlock your potential with a MCA degree

reasons.title: Gateway to the IT Industry
reasons.desc: MCA serves as a gateway to the vast IT industry. The program equips students with foundational knowledge and practical skills in software development, web design, database administration, networking, and other IT areas.

reasons.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
reasons.desc: MCA graduates have opportunities across IT companies, software firms, government agencies, finance, healthcare, and educational institutions. The versatile degree allows exploring diverse career paths.

reasons.title: In-demand Skills
reasons.desc: The curriculum covers programming languages, database management, software engineering, and computer applications — highly demanded across multiple industries.

reasons.title: Practical Training & Hands-On Exp.
reasons.desc: MCA programs emphasize practical training through projects, internships, and industry collaborations. Students apply theoretical knowledge to real-world problems.

reasons.title: Opportunities for Specialization
reasons.desc: Many MCA programs offer specialization in data science, machine learning, cybersecurity, AI, and mobile application development.

sectionTitle.main: What makes Department of MCA unique?

uniqueFeatures.subtitle: Setting us apart from the rest

features.title: Support Services
features.desc: MCA departments provide entrepreneurship and career support services, merit reviews, internship opportunities, and mentoring for student entrepreneurs.

features.title: Interdisciplinary Approach
features.desc: MCA departments collaborate with academic and industry partners to promote interdisciplinary research, joint projects, and knowledge exchange.

features.title: Research & Development
features.desc: The department focuses on holistic development offering professional skills, skill training, career readiness programs, and competitive preparation.

features.title: Community Engagement
features.desc: MCA departments engage with the local community, industry stakeholders through community programs and promote social responsibility among students.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the MCA programme

steps.label: Register Yourself
steps.desc: Create your account on the portal with your basic personal details and email address.

steps.label: Verify Details
steps.desc: Confirm your identity, educational background, and upload the necessary documents.

steps.label: Fill Application Online
steps.desc: Complete the online application form with all required academic and personal information.

steps.label: Pay Application Fee
steps.desc: Securely pay the application processing fee online via net banking, UPI, or card.

steps.label: Submit Application
steps.desc: Review your complete application and submit it for processing and review.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the MCA programme

items.q: What is the eligibility criteria for MCA admission?
items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (or equivalent) from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Science/Commerce/Arts stream students are all eligible.

items.q: What is the duration and fee structure of the MCA programme?
items.a: MCA is a 3-year (6 semester) programme. The tuition fee is ₹21,000 per semester. Additional charges include examination fee (₹2,500), development fee (₹2,500), and a one-time admission fee of ₹8,900.

items.q: What specializations are available in MCA at Career Point University?
items.a: Students can choose electives in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Mobile App Development, and IoT. These are offered as Discipline Specific Electives (DSE).

items.q: What kind of placements can I expect after completing MCA?
items.a: Career Point University has a strong placement record. MCA graduates have been placed at companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and Zalando with packages ranging from 6 LPA up to 75 LPA (highest).

items.q: Is there any scholarship available for MCA students?
items.a: Yes. Merit-based scholarships of up to 100% on tuition fees are available for students scoring above 90% in their qualifying examination. Early admission also offers an additional one-time benefit of up to ₹3,000.

items.q: What is the admission process for MCA?
items.a: Admissions are done through the DPM-SAT (Merit & Scholarship Test). After registration, candidates appear for the test, submit documents, pay the application fee, and receive their admission offer letter.

items.q: What labs and infrastructure are available for MCA students?
items.a: MCA students have access to the Microsoft Innovation Centre, Microsoft MTAC, Oracle Innovation Lab, Oracle Industry Lab, and an Artificial Intelligence Lab. Modern computer labs with the latest hardware and software are also available.

items.q: Can I pursue higher studies after completing MCA?
items.a: Yes. MCA graduates can pursue MCA (Master of Computer Applications), MBA in IT, M.Sc. in Computer Science, or directly enter the industry. Career Point University also offers an MCA programme with Data Science specialization.

roadmap.subtitle: Your intensive journey to becoming a Master of Computer Applications.

years.contentDesc: Master advanced data structures, algorithms, and full-stack development foundations.
Specialize in emerging technologies and complete your industry capstone project.

list.name: Archana Kumari

list.text: The research opportunities and cutting-edge labs at CPU are unmatched. I published 2 research papers during my BCA, which opened doors I never imagined.

overview.subtitle: What is the Ph.D. Programme?
paragraphs: Ph.D. Programme is a three-year, six-semester program that offers holistic knowledge of fundamentals in computational applications technology enabling efficient solutions for industries and business problems — fostering creativity and resolution-thinking by addressing AI-enhanced tools with IoT industry for providing real-time solutions efficiently.

Overall, Ph.D. programme enables students with a comprehensive understanding of computer science principles, practical skills in computer programming, and opportunities for career growth in the dynamic and evolving field of information technology.

scope.sectionTitle: Scope of Ph.D. in Computer Science (Ph.D.)
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in the world of technology
scope.body: The Ph.D. program is a comprehensive three-year undertaking that produces students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, spanning programming languages such as C, C++, Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. Additionally, students learn to leverage data, machine learning, AI research, writing skills, and skill development. Graduates can pursue roles as software developers, database administrators, system analysts, IT consultants, and cybersecurity professionals.

curriculum.subtitle: A well-structured curriculum designed for excellence
curriculum.introNote: The Ph.D. programme is a comprehensive curriculum providing students with a solid foundation in computer science, spanning programming languages (C, C++, Java), data structures, database management, software engineering, web development, and computer networks.
curriculum.outroNote: Graduates of Ph.D. are well prepared for diverse career specialization in the IT industry, including roles such as software developers, system analysts, IT consultants, database administrators, and cybersecurity professionals.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure
accordionSections.content:
The Ph.D. in Computer Sciences (Ph.D.) program at Career Point University is a comprehensive three-year undergraduate course designed to provide students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, including programming languages such as C, C++, and Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. In addition to these core topics, the program offers specialized modules in emerging fields like data science, machine learning, statistical analysis, and big data technologies, ensuring that students are well-versed in current industry trends.

The following table outlines the comprehensive course structure of the Ph.D. program. It is organized into core, elective, interdisciplinary, and skill enhancement components. Each category specifies the type of courses, their descriptions, and the corresponding credits, ensuring a well-rounded academic experience with a balance of foundational knowledge, research exposure, and professional ethics:

accordionSections.title: Semester-1
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 1 include: Programming Fundamentals (C Language), Mathematics I, Digital Electronics, Introduction to IT, and Communication Skills. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-2
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 2 include: Data Structures, Mathematics II, Object Oriented Programming (C++), Web Technology Basics, and Environmental Studies. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-3
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 3 include: Database Management Systems, Java Programming, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Elective I. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-4
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 4 include: Advanced Java, Software Engineering, Computer Architecture, Elective II, and Minor Project. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-5
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 5 include: Machine Learning, Data Science, Mobile Application Development, Elective III, and Internship. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-6
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 6 include: Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, Major Project, and Professional Ethics. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: University Core
accordionSections.content: University Core courses include: Environmental Science, Human Values & Professional Ethics, Indian Constitution & Traditional Knowledge, and Sports/NSS/NCC activities.

accordionSections.title: Departmental Elective
accordionSections.content: Departmental Elective options include: Advanced Database Systems, Internet of Things (IoT), Blockchain Technology, AR/VR Development, Big Data Analytics, and Natural Language Processing.

scholarships.subtitle: Scholarship for Session 2026-27
notes: Merit scholarship is offered to students based on previous class.
Tuition and fees may be net once your scholarship criteria is evaluated (A+ or equivalent year).
A 50% scholarship is given to students in the merit scholarship.
If a valid scholarship / subject scholarship fees are 50% off and student fails to continue, they may be eligible for cancellation scholarship.
To avail merit scholarship, student has to submit supporting documents in original along with 1 set of photocopies.

whyJoin.sectionTitle: Why Join Ph.D. in Computer Science (Ph.D.)?
whyJoin.subtitle: Unlock your potential with a Ph.D. degree

reasons.title: Gateway to the IT Industry
reasons.desc: Ph.D. serves as a gateway to the vast IT industry. The program equips students with foundational knowledge and practical skills in software development, web design, database administration, networking, and other IT areas.

reasons.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
reasons.desc: Ph.D. graduates have opportunities across IT companies, software firms, government agencies, finance, healthcare, and educational institutions. The versatile degree allows exploring diverse career paths.

reasons.title: In-demand Skills
reasons.desc: The curriculum covers programming languages, database management, software engineering, and computer applications — highly demanded across multiple industries.

reasons.title: Practical Training & Hands-On Exp.
reasons.desc: Ph.D. programs emphasize practical training through projects, internships, and industry collaborations. Students apply theoretical knowledge to real-world problems.

reasons.title: Opportunities for Specialization
reasons.desc: Many Ph.D. programs offer specialization in data science, machine learning, cybersecurity, AI, and mobile application development.

uniqueFeatures.sectionTitle: What makes Department of Ph.D. unique?
uniqueFeatures.subtitle: Setting us apart from the rest

features.title: Support Services
features.desc: Ph.D. departments provide entrepreneurship and career support services, merit reviews, internship opportunities, and mentoring for student entrepreneurs.

features.title: Interdisciplinary Approach
features.desc: Ph.D. departments collaborate with academic and industry partners to promote interdisciplinary research, joint projects, and knowledge exchange.

features.title: Research & Development
features.desc: The department focuses on holistic development offering professional skills, skill training, career readiness programs, and competitive preparation.

features.title: Community Engagement
features.desc: Ph.D. departments engage with the local community, industry stakeholders through community programs and promote social responsibility among students.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the Ph.D. programme

steps.label: Register Yourself
steps.desc: Create your account on the portal with your basic personal details and email address.

steps.label: Verify Details
steps.desc: Confirm your identity, educational background, and upload the necessary documents.

steps.label: Fill Application Online
steps.desc: Complete the online application form with all required academic and personal information.

steps.label: Pay Application Fee
steps.desc: Securely pay the application processing fee online via net banking, UPI, or card.

steps.label: Submit Application
steps.desc: Review your complete application and submit it for processing and review.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Ph.D. programme

items.q: What is the eligibility criteria for Ph.D. admission?
items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (or equivalent) from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Science/Commerce/Arts stream students are all eligible.

items.q: What is the duration and fee structure of the Ph.D. programme?
items.a: Ph.D. is a 3-year (6 semester) programme. The tuition fee is ₹21,000 per semester. Additional charges include examination fee (₹2,500), development fee (₹2,500), and a one-time admission fee of ₹8,900.

items.q: What specializations are available in Ph.D. at Career Point University?
items.a: Students can choose electives in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Mobile App Development, and IoT. These are offered as Discipline Specific Electives (DSE).

items.q: What kind of placements can I expect after completing Ph.D.?
items.a: Career Point University has a strong placement record. Ph.D. graduates have been placed at companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and Zalando with packages ranging from 6 LPA up to 75 LPA (highest).

items.q: Is there any scholarship available for Ph.D. students?
items.a: Yes. Merit-based scholarships of up to 100% on tuition fees are available for students scoring above 90% in their qualifying examination. Early admission also offers an additional one-time benefit of up to ₹3,000.

items.q: What is the admission process for Ph.D.?
items.a: Admissions are done through the DPM-SAT (Merit & Scholarship Test). After registration, candidates appear for the test, submit documents, pay the application fee, and receive their admission offer letter.

items.q: What labs and infrastructure are available for Ph.D. students?
items.a: Ph.D. students have access to the Microsoft Innovation Centre, Microsoft MTAC, Oracle Innovation Lab, Oracle Industry Lab, and an Artificial Intelligence Lab. Modern computer labs with the latest hardware and software are also available.

items.q: Can I pursue higher studies after completing Ph.D.?
items.a: Yes. Ph.D. graduates can pursue MCA (Master of Computer Applications), MBA in IT, M.Sc. in Computer Science, or directly enter the industry. Career Point University also offers an MCA programme with Data Science specialization.

list.text: Career Point University transformed my career. The faculty's dedication and industry-focused curriculum gave me the confidence to crack top MNC interviews.

list.name: Rahul Verma
list.text: The research opportunities and cutting-edge labs at CPU are unmatched. I published 2 research papers during my Ph.D., which opened doors I never imagined.

list.name: Priya Sharma
list.text: From day one, the university prepared us for real-world challenges. The industry tie-ups and live projects gave hands-on experience. I landed my dream job.

community.label: Community
description: The computer application community thrives on diversity, encompassing a dynamic range of individuals with varying backgrounds, perspectives, and expertise. This rich tapestry includes students, researchers, educators, and professionals, all contributing to a vibrant ecosystem of innovation and learning.

We are producing professionals with strong social ethics and moral values — involving integrating ethics education into the curriculum, fostering open discussions on ethical dilemmas, encouraging service-learning projects for community benefit, introducing established codes of ethics, and providing opportunities for interdisciplinary collaboration.
